ecarx.carext.connect.bt

Annotation Type IBtConstant.ACLFailReason


  • @Documented
 @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface IBtConstant.ACLFailReason
    ACL status fail reason
    IBtConstant.ACL_CONNECTION_SUCCESS
    IBtConstant.ACL_CONNECTION_FAILURE
    IBtConstant.EARPHONE_TERMINATION_CONNECTION
    IBtConstant.LOCAL_TERMINATION_CONNECTION
